name: nact
description: Give an AI agent the ability to act on nostr — it drafts the action, you enact it with a signature, your keys never move.

scripts.sync-connect: { echo "// vendored from JAFairweather/luke @ $(git -C ../../luke rev-parse --short HEAD) — do not edit; npm run sync-connect"; cat ../../luke/nave-connect.mjs; } > lib/nave-connect.mjs
scripts.sync-titlebar: { echo "// vendored from JAFairweather/nave.pub components @ $(git -C ../nave.pub rev-parse --short HEAD) — do not edit; npm run sync-titlebar"; cat ../nave.pub/components/nave-titlebar.mjs; } > lib/nave-titlebar.mjs
